title: Host/VM Restore Release Summary
description: Passive aggregate-only release readiness evidence for manual host/VM policy restore reviews. The artifact must not represent live restore execution, raw telemetry access, or automatic rollback activity.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this passive restore release summary contract.

created_utc.description: UTC creation time in compact RFC 3339 form.

summary_ready.description: True only when the aggregate summary is ready and has no blocking issues.

ready_restore_decision.description: Decision copied from the non-mutating restore executor dry-run evidence.

expected_blocked_decision.description: Decision copied from the expected-blocked restore executor fixture when supplied.

blocking_issues.description: Human-readable blockers that prevent release readiness.

changes_live_state.description: Must remain false; summary artifacts are passive review evidence only.

reads_raw_telemetry.description: Must remain false; raw telemetry, logs, credentials, datasets, and model binaries are out of scope.

aggregate_evidence_only.description: Must remain true because the summary only aggregates existing JSON evidence.

requires_manual_invocation.description: Must remain true to preserve the manual restore boundary.

safe_default.const: passive summary only; restore execution remains manual and dry-run by default
